name: Death by Chocolate
recipeIngredient: 1 package Chocolate cake or brownie mix
3 Skor candy bars, broken into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the chocolate cake or brownie mix according to the package instructions. Allow it to cool completely.
2. Prepare the pudding and let it chill well in the refrigerator.
3. Once the cake or brownies have cooled thoroughly, break them up into small pieces using a fork.
4. Mix the broken pieces with the chilled pudding and Skor candy bars.
5. Layer half of the mixture in the bottom of a serving dish.
6. Spread some Cool Whip over the layer of chocolate mixture.
7. Repeat the layers with more Cool Whip on top.
8. Optionally, add nuts and cherries for garnish.
This recipe is simpler than the original version, which was altered from the standard instructions to create this Death By Chocolate treat.
